commands.review_summary:
Threads the effective runtime `toolsAllow` list into local-model lean filtering and schema projection, with focused regression tests for `message` and wildcard allowlists.

PR surface: Source +26, Tests +65. Total +91 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main unconditionally removes `message` in local-model lean mode even when the runtime allowlist has explicitly required it. I did not run a live failing turn because this review was read-only.

target.title: fix(agents): preserve runtime tools in lean mode
target.body:
## Summary

- Preserve explicitly runtime-allowed tools when `localModelLean` applies its lightweight deny list.
- Thread the effective embedded `toolsAllow` list into tool construction and schema projection so runtime-required tools stay visible consistently.
- Add coverage for preserving `message` through lean mode and for wildcard allowlists not disabling lean mode wholesale.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts --reporter=dot` - passed 65 tests across 2 shards after rebasing to `ac0fb976c8e`.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts` - passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts` - passed.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` - passed.
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed`: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_40a59fc8840f`, slug `blue-prawn`, run `run_ca88bbfa27ee`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, exit `0`, `leaseStopped=true`.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings; `overall: patch is correct (0.86)`.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `localModelLean` no longer strips a tool that the runtime explicitly allowed for the current run, such as `message` for reply-required runs.

Real environment tested: focused local Vitest wrapper in a Codex worktree plus AWS Crabbox Linux `c7a.8xlarge` remote changed gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts --reporter=dot`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`.

Evidence after fix: focused tests passed 65 tests across 2 Vitest shards; Crabbox run `run_ca88bbfa27ee` completed `pnpm check:changed` with exit `0`; autoreview had no accepted/actionable findings after the final rebase.

Observed result after fix: lean local model mode still trims broad heavyweight defaults, but preserves explicitly requested runtime tools through construction and prompt/schema projection.

What was not tested: live provider/model execution was not run for this narrow tool filtering change.
target.author: vincentkoc
